notes_for_human_reviewer: OVER-ESCALATOR FAILURE MODE — the over-rotation, symmetric to the escalation/pushback over-steppers. The learner correctly notices the chase isn't working but responds by nuking a SOFT, off-critical-path, now-redundant dependency to the owner's manager AND cc'ing the sponsor/CISO, reporting Federation as 'blocked' and 'RED' on it — which is false (Workstream B already proceeded; the appendix is largely redundant). alternative_path_selection capped at 2 (wrong path: nuclear escalation where let-go/reclassify fits) and tone_and_proportion capped at 2 (disproportionate, 'a commitment is a commitment... not acceptable' — annoyed and inflating a non-issue). Also leaves the action OPEN and RED (record_discipline low) and invents critical-path stakes (caps diagnosis). Pre-set all five at {2, tol 2}: the move is well-argued-but-wrong-shape; tolerance absorbs run variance while the caps hold it off pass. Expect 1-3 across; only a 5 on any dim is a miss.
